Bash(/tmp/gen-script.go << 'GOEOF'
package main

import \(
	"fmt"
	"github.com/jclement/pdfify/internal/config"
	"github.com/jclement/pdfify/internal/converter"
	"github.com/jclement/pdfify/internal/theme"
\)

func main\(\) {
	cfg := config.DefaultConfig\(\)
	cfg.TocLevel = 3
	cfg.Title = "Full Features Demo"
	cfg.Subtitle = "Showcasing all pdfify capabilities"
	cfg.Author = "pdfify"
	cfg.Date = "2025"
	t := theme.Get\("default"\)
	fmt.Print\(converter.GenerateScript\(cfg, t\)\)
}
GOEOF)

Bash(/tmp/gen-script.go << 'GOEOF'
package main

import \(
	"fmt"
	"os"

	"github.com/jclement/pdfify/internal/config"
	"github.com/jclement/pdfify/internal/converter"
	"github.com/jclement/pdfify/internal/theme"
\)

func main\(\) {
	cfg := config.DefaultConfig\(\)
	cfg.TocLevel = 3
	cfg.Title = "Full Features Demo"
	cfg.Subtitle = "Showcasing all pdfify capabilities"
	cfg.Author = "pdfify"
	cfg.Date = "2025"
	t := theme.Get\("default"\)
	script := converter.GenerateScript\(cfg, t\)
	os.WriteFile\("/tmp/pdfify-debug-script.sh", []byte\(script\), 0755\)
	fmt.Println\("Done"\)
}
GOEOF)

package main

import \(
	"fmt"
	"os"

	"github.com/jclement/pdfify/internal/config"
	"github.com/jclement/pdfify/internal/converter"
	"github.com/jclement/pdfify/internal/theme"
\)

func main\(\) {
	cfg := config.DefaultConfig\(\)
	cfg.TocLevel = 3
	cfg.Title = "Full Features Demo"
	cfg.Subtitle = "Showcasing all pdfify capabilities"
	cfg.Author = "pdfify"
	cfg.Date = "2025"
	t := theme.Get\("default"\)
	script := converter.GenerateScript\(cfg, t\)
